execution_boundary.summary: Policy cards can express runtime allow/deny rules for execution checks.

preparation_boundary.summary: Policy cards may define whether preparation states require review.

commitment_boundary.summary: Machine-readable policy can become a policy reference for Commitment Candidate review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Policy cards need action ontology or semantic mapping to cover equivalent tool paths.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown actions should fail closed when no policy rule applies.

authority_boundary.summary: A policy card is policy evidence, not actor authority by itself.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Policy version and validity window must be current.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Machine-readable policy supports replay and reconstruction if versioned.

interoperability_path.summary: Policy cards can feed runtime checks and StegVerse commitment review as policy artifacts.

next_required_action: add policy-card fixture for unknown trajectory and preparation boundary cases
